headline: Insulet Trial Targets Type 2 Diabetes As Shares Trade Below Estimates
summary: Insulet (NasdaqGS:PODD) has started enrolling participants in its EVOLVE pivotal clinical trial for a fully closed-loop automated insulin delivery system for type 2 diabetes. The system is designed to adjust insulin automatically without meal-time interaction, with a potential market launch targeted for 2028, subject to regulatory approval. The EVOLVE trial is intended to evaluate safety and efficacy in a type 2 diabetes population, expanding beyond Insulet's existing focus on type 1...
